mapper.select: /** MSF_REQUEST 단건 조회 **/ SELECT A.REQ_BUY_TYPE_CD , A.OPEN_TYPE_CD , A.SERVICE_TYPE_CD , A.OPER_TYPE_CD , A.CSTMR_TYPE_CD , A.TMP_STEP_CD , A.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD , A.KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_CSTMR_NM , A.KNOTE_IDENTITY_ESS_NO , A.KNOTE_IDENTITY_TYPE_CD , A.KNOTE_IDENTITY_SCAN_DT , A.KNOTE_SCAN_ID , A.SCAN_ID , A.FATH_TRG_YN , A.FATH_TRG_IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD , A.FATH_TRANSAC_ID , A.FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DATE , A.FATH_TEL_NO , A.FATH_MOBILE_FN_NO , A.FATH_MOBILE_MN_NO , A.FATH_MOBILE_RN_NO , A.AUTH_INFO , A.IDENTITY_TYPE_CD , A.IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE , A.IDENTITY_ISSU_REGION , A.DRIVE_LICNS_NO , A.OPEN_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.PROD_TYPE_CD , A.PROD_ID , A.PROD_NM , A.REQ_PHONE_SN , A.REQ_MODEL_NM , A.SNTY_CAPAC_CD , A.SNTY_COLOR_CD , A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR , A.SHOP_USM_ID , A.USIM_KINDS_CD , A.REQ_USIM_SN , A.REQ_USIM_NM , A.EID , A.IMEI1 , A.IMEI2 , A.ESIM_PHONE_ID , A.UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO , A.REQ_WANT_FN_NO , A.REQ_WANT_MN_NO , A.REQ_WANT_RN_NO , A.INSR_CD , A.INSR_PROD_CD , A.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_YN , A.CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_YN , A.INSR_AUTH_INFO , A.PRNTS_CONTRACT_NUM , A.PRNTS_MOBILE_NO , A.JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE_CD , A.JEHU_PROD_TYPE_CD , A.REQ_ADDITION_LIST_NM , A.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE , A.PHONE_PAYMENT_YN , A.ON_OFF_TYPE_CD , A.SO_CD , A.OPEN_REQ_DT , A.REQ_IN_DAY , A.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_YN , A.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_YN , A.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_YN , A.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_YN , A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_YN , A.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_YN , A.CLAUSE_FATH_YN , A.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN , A.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN , A.BLCK_APP_DIV_CD , A.SO_TRNS_AGRM_YN , A.CLAUSE_JEHU_YN , A.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_YN , A.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR_YN , A.CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE_YN , A.CLAUSE_MPPS35_YN , A.CLAUSE_FINANCE_YN , A.CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_YN , A.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE_YN , A.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE_YN , A.CLAUSE_SENSI_COLLECT_YN , A.CLAUSE_SENSI_OFFER_YN , A.CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_YN , A.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE_YN , A.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE_YN , A.KT_COUNSEL_AGREE_YN , A.COMBINE_SOLO_TYPE_YN , A.COMBINE_SOLO_YN , A.ETC_SPECIAL_SBST , A.MEMO , A.REC_YN , A.RES_CD , A.RES_MSG , A.RES_NO , A.PROC_DT , A.PROC_CD , A.PRO_STTUS_CD , A.SBSC_PRO_CD , A.APP_FORM_YN , A.APP_FORM_XML_YN , A.FILE_NM , A.FILE_MASK_NM , A.FAX_YN , A.FAX_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_TEMP A WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/** MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR 단건 조회 **/ SELECT FORM_TYPE_CD , CSTMR_NM , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH , CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , CSTMR_PRIVATE_BIZ_NO , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_COUNTRY_CD , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VISA_NO , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VDATE_START_DATE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VDATE_END_DATE , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIZ_NO , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_REP_NM , UPJN_CD , BCU_SBST , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_USER_NM , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH , CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE_CD , CSTMR_TEL_FN_NO , CSTMR_TEL_MN_NO , CSTMR_TEL_RN_NO , CSTMR_MOBILE_FN_NO , CSTMR_MOBILE_MN_NO , CSTMR_MOBILE_RN_NO , CSTMR_ZIPCD , CSTMR_ADR , CSTMR_ADR_DTL , CSTMR_ADR_BJD , CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR , CSTMR_EMAIL_RECEIVE_YN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM_NO , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR_TEMP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/** MSF_REQUEST_AGENT 단건 조회 **/ SELECT FORM_TYPE_CD , MINOR_AGENT_NM , MINOR_AGENT_RRN , MINOR_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN_NO , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN_NO , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN_NO , MINOR_AGENT_AGRM_YN , MINOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , MINOR_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE_CD , MINOR_AGENT_CI_INFO , MINOR_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DATE , MINOR_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NO , JRDCL_AGENT_NM , JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN_NO , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN_NO , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_AGENT_TEMP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/** MSF_REQUEST_SALE 단건조회 **/ SELECT FORM_TYPE_CD , MODEL_ID , MODEL_MONTHLY , MODEL_INSTAMT , MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CD , MODEL_PRICE_VAT , MODEL_DISCOUNT1 , MODEL_SPRT , MODEL_PRICE , MODEL_DISCOUNT3 , REAL_MDL_INSTAMT , HNDSET_SALE_PRICE , SPRT_TYPE_CD , DC_AMT , MAX_APD_SPRT , ADD_DC_AMT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , RECYCLE_YN , USIM_PRICE_TYPE_CD , USIM_PRICE , USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD , SESPLS_YN , JOIN_PRICE_TYPE_CD , JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD , JOIN_PRICE , SOC_CODE , SOC_NM , SOC_BASE_CHRG_AMT FROM MSF_REQUEST_SALE_TEMP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/** MSF_REQUEST_BILL_REQ 단건조회 **/ SELECT FORM_TYPE_CD , REQ_PAY_TYPE_CD , REQ_BANK_CD , REQ_ACCOUNT_NM , REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN , REQ_ACCOUNT_REL_TYPE_CD , REQ_ACCOUNT_NO , REQ_CARD_NM , REQ_CARD_RRN , REQ_CARD_COMPANY_CD , REQ_CARD_NO , REQ_CARD_YY , REQ_CARD_MM , REQ_WIRE_TYPE_CD , OTHERS_PAYMENT_YN , OTHERS_PAYMENT_TEL_FN_NO , OTHERS_PAYMENT_TEL_MN_NO , OTHERS_PAYMENT_TEL_RN_NO , OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN , OTHERS_PAYMENT_REL_TYPE_CD , OTHERS_PAYMENT_REQ_NM , PRNTS_BILL_NO , CSTMR_BILL_SEND_TYPE_CD , CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR FROM MSF_REQUEST_BILL_REQ_TEMP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
